speaker: speaker1
text: What can I do for you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I'd like to buy some milk powder . What would you recommend ?

speaker: speaker1
text: We have many kinds of different purpose . I wonder whom you are buying for ?

speaker: speaker2
text: My son . He is two years old .

speaker: speaker1
text: I see , sir . This one is very good .

speaker: speaker1
text: You may rest assured . It sells well .

speaker: speaker2
text: May I have a look at the introduction ?
